name: serperior
flavor_texts: It can stop its opponents’ movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.
They raise their heads to intimidate opponents but only give it their all when fighting a powerful opponent.
It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not fazed by the glare from Serperior’s noble eyes.
text: Serperior is the Regal Pokémon. It is a grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: overgrow, contrary (hidden). Base stats — HP: 75, Attack: 75, Defense: 95, Sp. Atk: 75, Sp. Def: 95, Speed: 113. Evolution line: snivy → servine → serperior. Lore: It can stop its opponents’ movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally. They raise their heads to intimidate opponents but only give it their all when fighting a powerful opponent. It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not fazed by the glare from Serperior’s noble eyes.
